task_completion.description: Create a market research survey with the correct title.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the survey title 'Beverage Packaging Concept Test 2025' in the LimeSurvey dashboard, survey list, or survey settings.

task_completion.description: Create a question group named 'Concept Evaluation'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a question group titled 'Concept Evaluation' in the survey structure menu or group settings.

task_completion.description: Upload both concept images to the survey resources server.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'concept_vibrant.png' and 'concept_minimalist.png' in the LimeSurvey Resources/Files manager or image upload dialog.

task_completion.description: Create Question C1 featuring the vibrant concept image.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a question with Code 'C1', type '5-Point Choice', text 'How likely would you be to buy this design?', and displaying the 'concept_vibrant.png' image in the question editor or preview.

task_completion.description: Create Question C2 featuring the minimalist concept image.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a question with Code 'C2', type '5-Point Choice', text 'How likely would you be to buy this design?', and displaying the 'concept_minimalist.png' image in the question editor or preview.
Look for a status indicator showing the survey is 'Active', or the presence of a 'Stop this survey' / 'Deactivate' button in the survey overview.

integrity.description: The agent must use the LimeSurvey web interface to create the survey.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser navigating the LimeSurvey admin interface, rather than terminal windows executing API curl commands or database SQL inserts.

integrity.description: The agent must upload the actual image files from the local directory.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the file picker or upload dialog accessing '~/Documents/Concepts/' rather than linking to external URLs or using text placeholders.

integrity.description: The agent should not use direct database manipulation scripts.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of terminal windows running sqlite3 or python scripts to directly inject survey data into the LimeSurvey database.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The survey title must be exactly 'Beverage Packaging Concept Test 2025'. The question codes must be 'C1' and 'C2'. The question type must be '5-Point Choice' (internal LimeSurvey type '5'). Question C1 must include 'concept_vibrant.png' and Question C2 must include 'concept_minimalist.png'. Both images originate from ~/Documents/Concepts/ and must be uploaded to the LimeSurvey resource manager.
